creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Gentle bump, will this be difficult to fix? 

Recent examples include <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-hackers/2022-September/001447.html> and <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-hackers/2022-September/001470.html>. The absence of links always feels strange. 

Thanks
